summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements. The backend stores plaintext admin credentials and validates them in adminLogin, returning a boolean. The frontend uses sessionStorage to track admin session. The AdminDashboard shows AdminLoginForm when not authenticated, lists all feedback with Approve/Reject buttons, inline spinners, and toast notifications. ReviewsSection fetches only approved feedback and shows loading skeletons. However, there are notable gaps: approveFeedback and rejectFeedback are gated by Internet Identity/principal-based AccessControl rather than the username/password session token, feedback status persistence in stable storage is not clearly confirmed, and adminLogin returns a plain Bool rather than a token/session that can actually gate approveFeedback/rejectFeedback calls.

missing_requirements.requirement: approveFeedback and rejectFeedback functions only succeed when called with a valid admin session or credential (the username/password login).
missing_requirements.reason: In backend/main.mo, approveFeedback is gated by AccessControl.isAdmin(accessControlState, caller), which is principal/Internet-Identity-based access control, not the username/password adminLogin flow. adminLogin returns a Bool and does not issue any token or session that is checked by approveFeedback or rejectFeedback. There is no linkage between the username/password credential and the ability to call these functions.

missing_requirements.requirement: Feedback approval status is persisted across canister upgrades (stable storage).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows feedbackMap declared as a mutable let without a visible stable keyword in the truncated code. If feedbackMap is not stable, feedback status will be lost on canister upgrades.

missing_requirements.requirement: adminLogin returns an admin token or session that grants permission to approve or reject feedback.
missing_requirements.reason: adminLogin returns Bool, not a token or opaque session value. The AC states it should return a success/token response, and the token should be usable to authorize approveFeedback/rejectFeedback calls.

hallucinated_features.description: useResetFeedbackToPending hook and Reset-to-Pending button in the AdminDashboard FeedbackTab.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any ability to reset feedback back to pending status. This is an extra feature not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: updateFeedbackStatus backend function used by useRejectFeedback to set arbitrary statuses including pending.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks for approveFeedback and rejectFeedback as discrete functions. A generic updateFeedbackStatus function allowing arbitrary status changes was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Principal/Internet-Identity-based AccessControl gating approveFeedback and getAllFeedback.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists Internet Identity or third-party OAuth authentication as a non-goal, and the admin auth mechanism should be username/password only. Using principal-based access control for approveFeedback contradicts this constraint.
